name: JetBlue Premier Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 100,000 TrueBlue bonus points after spending $5,000 on purchases and paying the annual fee in full, both within the first 90 days.
notes: Barclays official JetBlue Premier page checked 2026-07-05 confirms 100,000 points after $5,000 purchases and annual fee paid in full within 90 days.

earning_rates.notes: Issuer page confirms elevated earning on eligible JetBlue purchases; exact multiplier should be rechecked if Barclays terms change.

recurring_credits.name: TrueBlue Travel Statement Credits
recurring_credits.description: Up to $300 in statement credits on TrueBlue Travel purchases per calendar year; terms apply.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 application fee statement credit every 4 years; terms apply.

lounge_access.name: BlueHouse
lounge_access.description: Complimentary access to BlueHouse for cardmembers with eligible fares; terms apply.

lounge_access.name: Lounge program access
lounge_access.description: Access to participating lounges and travel experiences; verify partner/network terms before display.

other_benefits.name: Companion pass statement credits
other_benefits.description: Earn up to $2,000 in companion pass statement credits after eligible purchases in a calendar year; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: Annual 25-tile bonus
other_benefits.description: Receive an annual 25-tile bonus after year-end to fast-track Mosaic status for the next year; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: 10% points back on award flights
other_benefits.description: Get 10% of points back after redeeming for and traveling on an Award Flight; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: Group 3 boarding
other_benefits.description: Group 3 boarding on JetBlue-operated flights; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: Free first checked bag
other_benefits.description: Free first checked bag for cardmember and up to 3 eligible companions on JetBlue-operated flights; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: No foreign transaction fees
other_benefits.description: No foreign transaction fees on international purchases.

sources.notes: Barclays official JetBlue Premier page; verified 2026-06-30.
JetBlue investor news confirms Premier Card enhanced benefits and $499 annual fee.
Secondary tracker for 100k offer and benefits.

application_rules.notes: Barclays terms note bonus may only be earned once and may be unavailable to current/previous program account holders.

notes: Dedicated product confirmed distinct from JetBlue Card and JetBlue Plus Card. Some benefit details are term-sensitive; prefer issuer terms for display copy.
